2605.10184.title: Developing a foundation model for high-resolution remote sensing data of the Netherlands
2605.10184.paper_summary: We develop a foundation model using 1.2m high resolution satellite images of the Netherlands. By combining a Convolutional Neural Network and a Vision Transformer, the model captures both low- and high-frequency landscape features, such as fine textures, edges, and small objects as well as large terrain structures, elevation patterns, and land-cover distributions. Leveraging temporal data as input, the model learns from broader contextual information across time, allowing the model to exploit the temporal dependencies, such as topographic features, land-cover changes, and seasonal dynamics. These additional constraints reduce feature ambiguity, improve representation learning, and enable better generalization with fewer labeled samples. The foundation model is evaluated on multiple downstream tasks, ranging from use cases within the Netherlands to global benchmarking datasets. On the vegetation monitoring dataset of the Netherlands, the model shows clear performance improvements by incorporating temporal information instead of relying on a single time point. Despite using a smaller model and less pretraining data limited to the Netherlands, it achieves competitive results on global benchmarks when compared to state-of-the-art models. These results demonstrate that the model can learn rich, generalizable representations from limited data, achieving competitive performance on global benchmarks while using a fraction of the parameters of larger state-of-the-art remote sensing models. To maximize reproducibility and reuse, we made the scripts and the model accessible on GitHub.
2605.10184.paper_summary_zh: 我們使用120萬張高解析度的荷蘭衛星影像來開發一個基礎模型。通過結合卷積神經網絡和視覺Transformer，該模型捕捉到低頻和高頻的景觀特徵，例如細緻的紋理、邊緣和小物體，以及大型地形結構、高程模式和土地覆蓋分佈。利用時間數據作為輸入，該模型從時間上的更廣泛上下文信息中學習，使模型能夠利用時間依賴性，例如地形特徵、土地覆蓋變化和季節性動態。這些額外的約束減少了特徵的模糊性，改善了表徵學習，並使得在標記樣本較少的情況下能夠更好地泛化。該基礎模型在多個下游任務上進行評估，涵蓋了從荷蘭的應用案例到全球基準數據集。在荷蘭的植被監測數據集中，該模型通過納入時間信息而不是依賴單一時間點，顯示出明顯的性能提升。儘管使用了較小的模型和僅限於荷蘭的較少預訓練數據，但與最先進的模型相比，它在全球基準測試中取得了具有競爭力的結果。這些結果表明，該模型可以從有限數據中學習豐富且可泛化的表徵，在使用較少的參數的情況下，實現了在全球基準測試中的競爭性表現。為了最大化可重現性和重用性，我們將腳本和模型上傳至GitHub以供訪問。
2605.10184.author: Paul Vermeeren et.al.
